choices.label: PK 30–40 µm; dikke endexine (~helft exine); brede colpi met rudimentair operculum; dunne margines.

21.26 *Fothergilla major*

PForml 0,90–1,37. Exine 1,8–2,0 µm; endexine ca. 1 µm. Onderscheid Brassicaceae kritisch.
